title: lepigonum glandulosum
intro: Lepigonum glandulosum, also known as the glandular Lepigonum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lepigonum glandulosum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Lepigonum glandulosum is typically prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
